summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Inspection Forms feature (Pressure Test Form and Aboveground Pipe Inspection Checklist). All backend APIs and frontend UI components working correctly. The 'Inspecciones' tab is visible in project details, forms can be created with auto-filled project data, viewed, edited, and deleted. Digital signatures functionality is available.

issues: Console warning: Missing 'Description' or 'aria-describedby={undefined}' for DialogContent - this is an accessibility enhancement recommendation, not a functional issue

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/inspection-forms - returns both form types for project
Backend: GET /api/inspection-forms with form_type filter works
Backend: POST /api/pressure-test-forms - creates form with auto-generated form_number
Backend: GET /api/pressure-test-forms/{form_id} - retrieves form by ID
Backend: PUT /api/pressure-test-forms/{form_id} - updates form data
Backend: DELETE /api/pressure-test-forms/{form_id} - deletes form
Backend: POST /api/aboveground-inspections - creates form with inspection_lines
Backend: GET /api/aboveground-inspections/{form_id} - retrieves form by ID
Backend: PUT /api/aboveground-inspections/{form_id} - updates form data
Backend: DELETE /api/aboveground-inspections/{form_id} - deletes form
Backend: Forms support signature data (base64 encoded images)
Backend: Invalid project returns empty arrays (not 404)
Backend: Non-existent form returns 404
Frontend: Inspecciones tab visible in project detail tabs
Frontend: 'Pressure Test' button opens new form dialog
Frontend: 'Pipe Inspection' button opens new form dialog
Frontend: Pressure Test Form dialog shows all sections (Project Info, Test Type, Test Boundaries, Test Conditions, etc.)
Frontend: Aboveground Inspection dialog shows checklist table with A/N/AC/N/A options
Frontend: Project data auto-filled in forms (Project No., Project Name)
Frontend: Form creation shows success toast 'Formulario creado'
Frontend: View button opens form in read-only mode
Frontend: Edit button opens form with editable fields
Frontend: Delete buttons available for all forms
Frontend: Form list shows form numbers (PTF-xxx, AGI-xxx) with status badges
Frontend: Signatures section present in both form types
seed_data_creation: Created test forms in Janssen project (proj_bfc46dbbc812) - forms with 'TEST' prefix for cleanup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Inspection Forms feature fully tested. Both Pressure Test Form and Aboveground Pipe Inspection Checklist are working. Login: j.carrero@ohsmspr.com / Admin2024!. Test project: Janssen (proj_bfc46dbbc812) has 3 PTF forms and 2 AGI forms.

features_verified.inspections_tab: ✓ Visible in project detail tabs at position after 'Seguridad'
features_verified.pressure_test_form_create: ✓ Dialog opens with all fields: Project Info, Test Type (5 checkboxes), Test Boundaries with P&ID entries, Test Conditions, Gauge Information, Test Execution, Test Results with signatures, Line Restoration signatures
features_verified.aboveground_inspection_create: ✓ Dialog opens with Project Info, Checklist table with 11 inspection columns (Joints/Clearance/Supports/Valves/Slope/Dead Legs/Alignment/Vents), Signatures section
features_verified.auto_fill_project_data: ✓ Project No. and Project Name auto-populated from project
features_verified.form_list_display: ✓ Two columns showing PTF and AGI forms with form numbers and status badges
features_verified.view_mode: ✓ Opens form in read-only mode with 'Cerrar' button
features_verified.edit_mode: ✓ Opens form with editable fields and 'Guardar/Cancelar' buttons
features_verified.delete_functionality: ✓ Delete buttons available on each form row
features_verified.signature_functionality: ✓ Signature fields present in both form types (Contractor, CST Representative)
features_verified.draft_save: ✓ Forms saved with 'draft' status by default
